steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text says maize doesn't closely resemble any wild plant, so its ancestor wasn't obvious — "only recently" did genetic research uncover that the ancestor is teosinte grass. The blank describes what genetic research did regarding the ancestor.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
Revealed means uncovered or made known — exactly fitting how genetic research disclosed a previously hidden fact. Expanded, encouraged, and petitioned don't describe disclosure of information.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
